channel.title: c++ on Neal's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in c++ on Neal's Blog
channel.copyright: © This post is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License，please give source if you wish to quote or reproduce.

item.title: 回调函数
item.description: 本文围绕《回调函数》展开，重点梳理回调函数、回调函数的机制和为什么要使用回调函数等内容，提炼背景、思路与实践注意点。
